description: A Change Request (CR-105) has been issued: The required system response time has been tightened from 2 seconds to 500 milliseconds. Using the details in 'ChangeRequest_CR105.txt' on the Desktop, locate the upstream Stakeholder Need (NEEDS-05) and the dependent System Requirement (SRS-12). Update the description of SRS-12 to specify '500ms' instead of '2 seconds', add the comment 'Updated per CR-105', and save the project.
